orphans.name: Implement time tracking
orphans.description: Add time start/stop/report commands with cursor-based action tracking

orphans.name: Undo or reopen mechanism
orphans.description: Add prism reopen command to reset completed items and undo cascade completion

orphans.name: Status change notification
orphans.description: When cascading status changes a parent from completed to in-progress, print a notification message to inform the user.

orphans.name: Manager circular dependency risk
orphans.description: Extract status cascade logic into a separate service or use events/signals to reduce tight coupling between CRUDManager and TaskManager

orphans.name: Generic exception handling in storage manager
orphans.description: Catch specific exceptions like OSError, IOError, PermissionError instead of generic Exception to avoid masking programming errors

orphans.name: Bug lifecycle transition validation
orphans.description: Add state transition validation to prevent invalid jumps (e.g., open → implemented) in BugItem.set_status()

orphans.name: Bug log directory structure scalability
orphans.description: Consider date-based subdirectories and orphan cleanup strategy for deleted bugs to prevent unwieldy directories

orphans.name: CLI command stub implementation backlog
orphans.description: Implement bug and config CLI commands or hide from help text until ready to avoid user confusion

orphans.name: BugManager abstraction layer
orphans.description: Create BugManager similar to OrphanManager for centralized bug CRUD operations to prevent logic duplication

orphans.name: child_uuids cleanup consistency
orphans.description: Audit all deletion paths and consider automatic child_uuids management via property setters

orphans.name: Status value magic strings
orphans.description: Use Literal types or enums for status values to prevent typos and enable easier refactoring

orphans.name: TaskManager CLI coupling
orphans.description: Replace click.echo() with events/callbacks/logging to improve testability and enable non-CLI reuse

orphans.name: ArchivedItem status field inconsistency
orphans.description: Review ArchivedItem model and ensure status field uniformity across all item types

orphans.name: Integration test coverage gaps
orphans.description: Add end-to-end tests for bug workflow, status cascade, and CLI-manager integration

orphans.name: Bug ID auto-generation mechanism
orphans.description: Implement BugManager.generate_bug_id() with atomic counter persistence to prevent race conditions and duplicates
